files_deferred: Full ~110-variable MTF matrix (ADX/DI, Bollinger, VWAP, CVD, keltner) -> later feature pass; bounded indicator set established.
Dealer dynamics velocities (market_dynamics.py, flip/wall velocity, wall rupture) -> observation-only, history-dependent; deferred.
Confidence-to-Kelly sizing weights and the full 27-cell decision_matrix table -> risk/policy phases.
Directional trend scoring from flow/CVD (score_directional) -> requires MTF flow features; direction is derived from spot vs gamma flip for now.
behavior_preserved: Operational restrictions are immutable hard vetoes, separate from empirical structural hypotheses (spec §23).
Long gamma = pinning/premium-selling regime; short gamma structurally vetoes premium selling and permits directional debits (gate_scorer premium vs directional gates).
Catalyst is a hard stop; late-day entry lockout and session-closed block entry.
Robust scales are scored before being updated and read neutral until warm; scale state persists across restarts (ScaleBook intent).
intentional_changes: Legacy consumes the Phase 3 StructuralState (gamma sign/flip/walls) rather than the System A MarketSnapshot dataclass.
LegacyDecisionView is a typed, content-addressed contract with explicit veto categories (operational vs structural) and reason codes.
MTF resampling is bar-count grouping over canonical Bars (bounded) instead of pandas time-rule resampling.
known_gaps: MTF is a bounded indicator set (return/EMA slope/RSI/realized vol); the full matrix and ADX/Bollinger/VWAP/CVD are deferred.
Dealer-dynamics velocities and wall-rupture (observation-only) are not yet computed.
Structural confidence and size cap are simple functions of net ratio/concentration; the journal-calibrated gate_scorer weights are a later pass.
Legacy parity is determinism/golden against a synthetic scenario; parity against a running System A gate decision is future work.
rollback: Revert the Phase 4 commit. Phases 0-3 are unaffected; no runtime services and no persisted state beyond the opt-in RobustStandardizer file (best-effort, self-healing).
No new third-party dependencies were added in Phase 4.
next_phase: Phase 5 — Data, labels, and V2 (spec §63): as-of datasets, labels, folds, calibration, V2 models, V2 registry, canonical forecast bundle, and fail-closed serving.
